name: ledger-wallet-cli
description: Codex JSON harness for the official @ledgerhq/wallet-cli command contract.

interface.shortDescription: Present and run wallet-cli capabilities with JSON parsing.
interface.longDescription: Adds Codex instructions and a local harness for the official @ledgerhq/wallet-cli 1.0.2 contract: a capability-first presentation, wallet-cli-only routing, balance-all workflow, JSON output parsing, strict flag handling, and dry-run-first send guidance. The harness preserves the wallet-cli command surface instead of substituting another wallet stack. This is an independent local plugin and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Ledger.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the wallet-cli-only decision tree; route balances through balance-all.
